name: Conda Mamba On HPC
summary: Create Conda or Mamba environments while protecting shared HPC filesystems.
description: This skill helps users create Conda/Mamba environments in explicit prefixes, manage package caches, export environment metadata, and avoid common HPC filesystem and module conflicts.

inputs.name: environment_prefix
inputs.description: User-owned prefix where the Conda/Mamba environment should be created.

inputs.name: environment_file
inputs.description: YAML environment specification with channels and dependencies.

inputs.name: package_cache
inputs.description: Optional user-owned package cache path suitable for local site policy.

outputs.name: conda_environment
outputs.description: A Conda/Mamba environment created under an explicit prefix.

outputs.name: environment_export
outputs.description: Exported YAML and package list for reproducibility and support.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Run the script with a small environment file on a site-approved package cache and prefix.
